EXP-400.name: The Champion
EXP-400.description: Regime-adaptive credit spreads & iron condors on SPY. Switches between bull puts and bear calls based on trend detection (MA crossovers). No ML. Robustness score: 0.870.

EXP-401.name: The Blend
EXP-401.description: Blended strategy combining credit spreads with straddles/strangles on SPY. Uses volatility regime detection to select optimal structure. No ML. Walk-forward validated (3/3 passed).

EXP-500.name: ML Champion
EXP-500.phase: Phase 1 complete. ML work shipped via EXP-503.
EXP-500.next_step: Model validation — assess EXP-503 paper trading results

EXP-501.name: ML Blend
EXP-501.next_step: Blocked on EXP-500. Start after EXP-500 proves concept.
EXP-501.notes: XGBoost overlay on EXP-401. Starts after EXP-500.

EXP-503.name: ML V2 Aggressive
EXP-503.description: Machine learning-driven credit spreads on SPY. XGBoost regime classifier routes trades through ML-optimized position sizing. Aggressive Kelly sizing with model confidence weighting.

EXP-600.name: IBIT Adaptive
EXP-600.description: Direction-adaptive credit spreads on IBIT (Bitcoin ETF). MA50-based trend detection, 14 DTE, 10% OTM. No ML. Optimized via mega parameter sweep (139% avg annual backtest).
EXP-600.notes: IBIT direction-adaptive credit spreads. Mega sweep config #14. DTE=14, OTM=10%, Width=$5, PT=30%, SL=2.5x, MA50 adaptive, MaxPos=5, Risk=15%, Kelly=1.0. 139.2% avg annual, -19.4% max DD, 0.95 overfit.

EXP-031.name: Compound Bull Put
EXP-031.retired_reason: Overfit score 0.590 (hard gate failed). DTE cliff. Compound sizing artifacts.
EXP-031.notes: REJECTED — overfit score 0.590 (hard gate failed), DTE cliff, compound sizing artifacts

EXP-305.name: COMPASS Portfolio
EXP-305.retired_reason: Multi-ticker approach superseded by focused EXP-400/401.

EXP-601.name: IBIT ML Signal Filter
EXP-601.notes: XGBoost binary classifier (win/loss) trained on EXP-600 champion config trade features. Time-series CV only. max_depth=3, min_child_weight=5. Backtest comparison: EXP-600 with vs without ML filter.

EXP-700.name: ML-Filtered Champion
EXP-700.description: EXP-400 champion signal generation (dte=15, otm=2%, width=$12, sl=1.25x, pt=55%, risk=8.5%) gated by the EXP-305 ensemble ML filter (XGBoost+RandomForest+ExtraTrees, AUC=0.793, threshold=0.65). Walk-forward validated: +13.8pp return improvement, +5pp win rate on 2025 holdout vs unfiltered baseline.
EXP-700.notes: ML ensemble filter (ensemble_model_20260324.joblib) on EXP-400 champion. Baseline comparison: EXP-503 (PA3Z9PLVYUL5, no ML). 35 features, fail_open=true.

EXP-800.name: Safe Kelly 4/7/9
EXP-800.description: EXP-400 champion signal generation (dte=15, otm=2%, width=$12, sl=1.25x, pt=55%) with Safe Kelly criterion position sizing and 3-tier portfolio drawdown circuit breakers. Kelly fractions: bull=9%, neutral=7%, bear=4%. Circuit breakers: Tier1 DD≤-8% → halve sizing, Tier2 DD≤-10% → floor to 2%, Tier3 DD≤-12% → flatten + halt 30 trades.
EXP-800.notes: Safe Kelly 4/7/9 on EXP-400 champion. Kelly HWM + CB state persisted in data/exp800/pilotai_exp800.db (table: kelly_state).

EXP-307.name: Sector ETF Diversification
EXP-307.description: Multi-ticker regime-adaptive credit spreads on SPY + XLI (industrials) + XLF (financials). MA crossover regime detection independently per ticker. +33 additional trades/yr vs SPY-only, improving Sharpe through sector diversification. DTE=15, OTM=2%, width=$12 (SPY)/$3 (ETFs), SL=1.25x, PT=55%, risk=8.5%. Max 2 positions per ticker, 6 total.
EXP-307.notes: Sector ETF diversification extending EXP-400 champion. No ML filter. Combo regime for SPY, MA crossover for XLI/XLF.
